Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC012 "AGENTXII-PART3-C012" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Agent X II (Part 3) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Set $CB91 to $01 in the dump file to remove the password protection. The loading screen is from the Spectrum version.
